_comment: Deterministic time formulas per process. Constants sourced from Machinery's Handbook and laser/press brake vendor specs.
_calibration: Tune constants against real vendor quotes — Andrew's PO examples are the calibration target.

LASER_CUT.description: Time based on cut perimeter length and pierce count per material+thickness

WATERJET.description: Slower than laser but handles thick plate and any material

TUBE_LASER.description: Linear cutting length along tube profile

PRESS_BRAKE.description: Time per bend including positioning and stroke. Setup covers tool selection and first-piece setup.

TAP.description: Time per tapped hole. Assumes standard machine tapping.

CNC_MILL.description: Time per milled feature (hole, pocket, slot, contour op). Setup covers program load and fixturing.

LATHE.description: Time per turned feature. Setup covers chuck and tool setup.

WELD_TIG.description: Time per weld joint/bead. Setup covers fixturing and tack.

PAINT.description: Tiered by blank area (proxy for surface area). Includes prep, prime, topcoat.

POWDER_COAT.description: Tiered by blank area. Includes rack, coat, cure, rack-off.

ANODIZE.description: Aluminum only. Tiered by blank area. Includes rack, tank time, seal, rack-off.
